_comment: Provider registry for Red Dog sensor API client. APIM base URL: https://reddog.azure-api.net. Key Vault secret names must match secrets stored in each farm's Azure Key Vault.

selectronic.name: Selectronic SP PRO
selectronic.description: Solar/battery inverter — battery SoC, solar/grid/load power (W), daily energy (kWh), fault codes. Cloud access via select.live using site ID.

wattwatchers.name: WattWatchers Energy Monitor
wattwatchers.description: Circuit-level energy monitoring — real/apparent power, energy (kWh), power factor per circuit. Short energy (30s) and long energy (5min) intervals. Switch control via PATCH.

pairtree.name: Pairtree Horticulture
pairtree.description: Horticulture IoT platform — soil moisture, temperature, rainfall, tank levels, weather metrics. Time-series per device. Provides data and device inventory.

the_things_network.name: The Things Network (TTN/LoRaWAN)
the_things_network.description: LoRaWAN uplink data from TTN v3. Receives decoded sensor payloads from field devices (soil, weather, relay nodes) via APIM webhook. Also supports MQTT at au1.cloud.thethings.network:8883.

_notes.selectronicSiteId: Grassgum Farm site ID = 3501 (stored in GrassgumFarm Key Vault as 'selectronic-site-id')
_notes.apimAlreadyConfigured: APIM is live at reddog.azure-api.net. Pairtree routes through /api/v1, TTN webhooks through /webhooks/ttn.
_notes.addingProviders: To add a new provider: 1) Add entry here, 2) Create API in APIM with Key Vault policy, 3) Add secret to farm Key Vault, 4) Add provider ID to farmProviders for relevant farms.
